edge_hypothesis: MACD histogram zero-line crossover is a discrete momentum-confirmation event that fires once per momentum shift, unlike RSI which oscillates continuously and produces noisy signals within its 40-70 band. When MACDh crosses from negative to positive AND price is above EMA_50, it confirms a new bullish momentum impulse with trend context. This event-driven signal should produce fewer but higher-quality entries than ema_rsi_atr's continuous RSI filtering. The edge comes from timing: MACD catches momentum acceleration after the initial move establishes direction but before the trend is fully priced in.
regime_assumption: Works best in trending-to-transitional regimes where momentum shifts are meaningful. Invalidates in tight ranging markets where MACD oscillates around zero rapidly. ADX gate filters these out.

variants.name: macd_momentum_core
variants.description: Core MACD zero-cross strategy with EMA_50 trend context. Standard risk parameters. Tests whether MACD histogram zero-cross has any edge as a standalone entry signal.
entry_long: Require MACDh_12_26_9 cross from <= 0 to > 0 on bar close.
Require close > EMA_50 for bullish trend context.
entry_short: Require MACDh_12_26_9 cross from >= 0 to < 0 on bar close.
Require close < EMA_50 for bearish trend context.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on opposite MACD histogram zero-cross.
Exit on price crossing back below EMA_50 (trend invalidation for longs).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (20 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Rapid MACD whipsaw near zero line
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Late momentum entry at trend exhaustion
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 from entry.
Take profit at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry (1.67:1 R:R).
Minimum viable stop floor: 1.0x ATR per advisory.

components.notes: MACDh_12_26_9 zero-line cross as momentum signal

variants.name: macd_adx_gated
variants.description: MACD zero-cross with ADX trending regime gate. Hypothesis: MACD signals are only valuable in established trends (ADX > 20), filtering out ranging periods where histogram oscillates randomly near zero.
entry_long: Require MACDh_12_26_9 cross from <= 0 to > 0 on bar close.
Require close > EMA_50 for bullish trend context.
Require ADX_14 > 20 for trending regime confirmation.
entry_short: Require MACDh_12_26_9 cross from >= 0 to < 0 on bar close.
Require close < EMA_50 for bearish trend context.
Require ADX_14 > 20 for trending regime confirmation.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on opposite MACD histogram zero-cross.
Exit on ADX_14 dropping below 15 (regime invalidation).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (25 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Rapid MACD whipsaw near zero line
Hypothesis failure mode guard: ADX trending but directionless
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 from entry.
Take profit at 3.0x ATR_14 from entry (1.5:1 R:R).

components.notes: MACDh_12_26_9 zero-line cross as momentum signal

variants.name: macd_wide_horizon_btc
variants.description: MACD with BTC-calibrated wide stops and extended trade horizon. BTC drawdowns are 10-20x larger than ETH at same ATR mult, so this variant uses 2.5x stop with 4.0x TP for a 1.6:1 R:R and longer max bars.
entry_long: Require MACDh_12_26_9 cross from <= 0 to > 0 on bar close.
Require close > EMA_50 for bullish trend context.
entry_short: Require MACDh_12_26_9 cross from >= 0 to < 0 on bar close.
Require close < EMA_50 for bearish trend context.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Asset calibration: BTC requires wider stops due to higher absolute volatility
exit_rules: Exit on opposite MACD histogram zero-cross.
Exit on price crossing back through EMA_50 (trend invalidation).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (30 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: BTC flash crash exceeding stop
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Late momentum entry near local top/bottom
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 0.75% (reduced for BTC volatility).
Stop loss at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry (BTC-calibrated).
Take profit at 4.0x ATR_14 from entry (1.6:1 R:R).
Asset-specific: BTC drawdowns historically 10-20x larger than ETH at same ATR mult.

components.notes: MACDh_12_26_9 zero-line cross as momentum signal
